import api from'./api';const leaveService={request:data=>api.post('/leaves',data),getMyLeaves:params=>api.get('/leaves/my',{params}),getMyBalance:()=>api.get('/leaves/balance'),cancel:id=>api.patch("/leaves/".concat(id,"/cancel")),// Admin / Manager
getAll:params=>api.get('/leaves',{params}),getByEmployee:(userId,p)=>api.get("/leaves/employee/".concat(userId),{params:p}),approve:id=>api.patch("/leaves/".concat(id,"/approve")),reject:(id,reason)=>api.patch("/leaves/".concat(id,"/reject"),{reason})};export default leaveService;
